name: Baby Unicorn with Stars
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a tiny chubby baby unicorn sitting down with a small curly mane and a short spiral horn, big sparkly eyes and a fluffy tufted tail, surrounded by floating five-point stars and a couple of little hearts

name: Rainbow Unicorn
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a graceful unicorn prancing with one hoof raised, a long flowing mane and tail made of rainbow-striped curls, a spiral horn, and a big arching rainbow behind it with a couple of rounded clouds

name: Unicorn Castle
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a magical unicorn standing in front of a tall fairytale castle with pointed towers, a flowing mane and a spiral horn, stars and a crescent moon in the sky, and a path lined with flowers leading to the castle gate
